textPlain: Wow, this reads like dystopian science fiction. As I celebrate the holidays with my newly born human, I sure hope that more people start wanting to bet on brighter tomorrows and actually put some skin in the game.

Here me out here:We make wfh a right for all appropriate jobsWe improve fiber optic connectivity in rural communitiesWe incentivize young families to move to rural communities---The main thing here is we break the unnecessary chains of offices and commuting and allow families to build where they have the space and want for them.Cities are inherently isolating - space is at a premium - which means there is constant pressure to not expand in many different ways.
